footer.tagline: The platform for Pocket Drifterz collectors. Binder, secure trades and marketplace — among drift and JDM enthusiasts.

home.heroIntro: Manage your binder, track every version of every card, trade with the community and hunt the holos of Season 1 · Forged Engine.
home.seasonDesc: The first Pocket Drifterz edition: 67 numbered cards, secret Legendary and Gold cards.

pages.soon: This section is already wired into the navigation. Its dynamic content is coming very soon.

collection.qtyLoginRequired: Sign in to update your binder.
collection.loginGateMessage: Sign in or create an account to add this card to your binder.

rankings.title: Rankings

search.title: Search
search.browsePrompt: Run a search or filter by rarity and version to explore the catalog.

season.title: Forged Engine
season.desc: The first Pocket Drifterz edition: 80 numbered cards — Standard for all, plus Unique, Promotional, Special, Collaboration or Signed where applicable.
season.horsSerieDesc: Cards outside numbered sets: promos, collaborations and special editions beyond S01/S02.

profile.guestDesc: Sign in to see your reputation, badges, and public profile. In the meantime, explore the catalog and community.
profile.sessionHint: Your Auth0 session is active but your profile hasn't synced yet. Retry or sign out and back in if this keeps happening.

exchanges.kicker: Double validation · chat tied to each trade
exchanges.title: My Trades
exchanges.noUser: Sign in to view your trades.
exchanges.emptyCurrentBrowse: No active trades — see who's open to trade.
exchanges.selectExchange: Select a trade from the list to view details.
exchanges.selectGiveCards: Select cards to offer in return
exchanges.confirmHint: Both parties confirm the deal before shipping begins.
exchanges.openToTradeHint: Members offering or looking for cards — send them a trade proposal.
exchanges.selectOrPropose: Or pick a member below to send a trade proposal.
exchanges.guestEmpty: Sign in to track your active trades.
exchanges.cautionInfo: Deposits (€5/side) will be held in your wallets upon confirmation.
exchanges.completeHint: By confirming, the cards are transferred into your respective collections.
exchanges.cautionReleaseInfo: Deposits (€5/side) will be returned upon confirmation.

sell.title: List for sale
sell.subtitle: Pick a card from your binder and offer it to the community.
sell.noCards: You have no cards to list yet.
sell.typeAuctionDesc: Let the market set the price.
sell.auctionHint: The auction starts right away. The card is locked until the sale ends.
sell.priceHint: Listed price — buyers pay from their credit wallet (Stripe top-up, min. €5).
sell.disclaimer: Top up deposit credits (not withdrawable) to buy. Seller earnings are credited separately and will be withdrawable.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.auctionDesc: Drive prices up or sell to the highest bidder — auto-bid, reserve price, anti-snipe extension.
marketplace.disclaimer: Secured member-to-member purchases — the seller is notified and must honor the sale. Distinct from the official Pocket Drifterz shop.

buyError.SELF_PURCHASE: You cannot buy your own listing.
buyError.STRIPE_MIN_AMOUNT: Amount too low for secure payment (minimum €0.50).
buyError.STRIPE_ERROR: Stripe error — try again or contact the seller.
buyError.INSUFFICIENT_CREDIT: Insufficient balance — top up your wallet (min. €5).

cartError.SELF_PURCHASE: You cannot buy your own listing.
cartError.IN_OTHER_CART: This card is already in another member's cart.
cartError.INSUFFICIENT_CREDIT: Insufficient balance — top up your wallet (min. €5).

marketplace.sellersEmpty: No offers available for this card.

marketplaceCart.title: Marketplace cart
marketplaceCart.disclaimer: Added listings are reserved for you and hidden from others. The seller is notified.
marketplaceCart.selectionHint: No checkbox selected = entire cart goes to checkout.
marketplaceCart.selectedCount: {count, plural, one {# item selected} other {# items selected}}
marketplaceCart.walletHint: You have enough in your wallet — instant payment, no Stripe needed.
marketplaceCart.stripeHint: Secure payment via Stripe. Sellers are credited to their earnings balance.
marketplaceCart.paymentCancelled: Payment cancelled — adjust your selection and try again.
marketplaceCart.confirmationPaidHint: Invoice sent by email. Sellers have been notified and credited.
marketplaceCart.shippingAddressHint: Your shipping address will be requested by the seller via the messaging system after confirmation (wallet payment), or entered at the next step (Stripe payment).
marketplaceCart.stripeFeeConsent: I accept the {fee} Stripe processing fee added to the total.

checkoutError.LISTING_UNAVAILABLE: A listing is no longer available.

notifications.markAllHint: Mark all as read — coming soon

wallet.withdrawSuccess: Transfer initiated — funds arrive in a few business days.
wallet.topUpHint: Minimum {min} € credit. A 5% platform fee is added to the Stripe charge.

withdrawError.CONNECT_NOT_SETUP: Set up your bank account first.
withdrawError.CONNECT_PAYOUTS_DISABLED: Bank setup incomplete — finish Stripe onboarding.

topUpError.TERMS_NOT_ACCEPTED: You must accept the terms of sale.

auctions.subtitle: Member auctions — matchmaking only for now.
auctions.errorSelfBid: You can't bid on your own listing.

cart.title: Cart
cart.noUser: Log in to see your cart.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.noUser: Log in to complete your order.
checkout.stripeRedirect: You will be redirected to Stripe to pay securely.
checkout.loginRequired: Log in to complete your official shop order.
checkout.cancelled: Payment cancelled — you can try again anytime.
checkout.errorUnauthorized: Session expired — please log in again.
checkout.errorStripeNotConfigured: Stripe is not configured on this server.
checkout.errorUnknown: Could not start payment. Please try again.

orders.title: My orders
orders.noUser: Log in to see your orders.
orders.successPaid: Payment confirmed — thank you for your order!

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noUser: Log in to access the dashboard.
dashboard.guestPreview: Dashboard preview — sign in to manage your listings.

accessDenied.title: Access denied
accessDenied.body: You are signed in, but this account has no staff role on The Park (Owner, moderator, catalog, shop…).
accessDenied.hint: Ask an Owner to assign the “park_owner” role in Auth0, or add your email to STAFF_OWNER_EMAILS on Vercel and sign in again.

upload.dropzoneHint: JPEG, PNG or WebP · max 4 MB
upload.uploadErrorStorage: Image storage is not configured on the server (Vercel Blob). Contact the administrator.
upload.storageBannerBody: On Vercel, admin uploads use Vercel Blob. Without it, only the manual URL field works.
upload.storageBannerStep1: Open Vercel dashboard → The Park project → Storage tab.
upload.storageBannerStep2: Create a Blob store (or Connect) and link it to this project.
upload.storageBannerStep3: Redeploy — BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN will be injected automatically.
upload.storageBannerFallback: Meanwhile, paste an image URL in the text field below the drop zone.

roles.title: Roles & permissions
roles.setupHint: Create the 5 RBAC roles in Auth0 (park_owner, park_moderator…). One-time setup.
roles.setupSuccess: Auth0 roles OK — {created} created, {existing} already present.

shop.title: Shop management
shop.empty: No products yet. Create the first one above.
shop.name: Product
shop.descriptionPlaceholder: Text shown on the shop product page…
shop.releaseDateHint: Optional — useful for limited editions or pre-orders.
shop.imagesHint: The 1st image is the catalog thumbnail. Drop an image or enter a path.
shop.noImages: No images — the product will display without a visual.

catalog.title: Catalog management
catalog.name: Name
catalog.numberHint: Required. Use 0 for promo / out-of-set cards (one per season).
catalog.imageDropHint: Drop an image or enter the filename below.
catalog.confirmDeleteVariant: Delete variant “{label}”? Linked collections and listings will also be removed.
catalog.numberHintHorsSerie: Free number within HS (1, 2, 3…). Each number once only.
catalog.errNumberRequired: Enter a card number (0 = out-of-set promo).
catalog.errNumberTaken: This number is already used in the season — edit the existing card or pick another number.
catalog.errVariantInUse: Variant tied to an active exchange or dispute — cannot delete.
catalog.errLastVariant: Cannot delete the last variant of a card.

support.title: Member support
support.contactHint: Contact: support@thepark.local — disputes go through moderation.

users.title: Users
users.errSelf: You cannot act on your own account.
users.errStaff: Not allowed: this account is staff.

adjust.title: Adjust stock
adjust.quantityHint: Enter the absolute quantity — the sign is determined by the movement type.
adjust.errorDelta: Quantity must be a non-zero integer.

help.title: Help
help.qCollectionVersions: Why is each version tracked separately?
help.aCollectionVersions: Every card exists as Standard. Some also offer Unique, Promotional, Special, Collaboration or Signed — each version counts toward completion.
help.qCollectionMissing: How do I find missing cards?
help.aCollectionMissing: Use the « Missing » filter in your binder or Season 1 page.
help.qMarketplacePayment: Can I pay on the marketplace?
help.aMarketplacePayment: Yes, via the wallet: top up min. €5 via Stripe (+ 5% fee) as deposit credits (not withdrawable). Sellers receive earnings in a separate balance, withdrawable to their bank.
help.aMarketplacePrice: No, they are indicative between members.
help.aExchangeValidation: Both parties must accept. Timestamped history is kept for disputes.
help.aExchangeSecured: Optional Stripe deposit, guided video proofs and 72 h guarantee window.
help.aShopOfficial: Official shop sells new Lighton products with real Stripe payment.
help.aShopShipping: Ships within 48 business hours for in-stock items.
help.aAccountMinor: Age check at signup, parental consent under 15, chat tied to trades only.
help.aAccountData: Request export or deletion from Settings (GDPR).

sellReady.title: Before you sell
sellReady.intro: A few account steps to complete before publishing a listing.

account.title: Verified account
account.desc: Your email must be confirmed and your account active.
account.hint: Check the confirmation email from Auth0, then sign in again.

age.title: Age & minor protection
age.desc: Enter your date of birth. Minors need a guardian's consent.
age.label: Date of birth
age.minorNotice: You are a minor: an email will be sent to your guardian to approve your seller registration.

address.title: Shipping address
address.desc: Required to ship the cards you sell.

payout.title: Seller payouts
payout.desc: Set up your bank account on the Wallet page to withdraw earnings.
payout.hint: Optional to sell — required only to withdraw earned money.

settings.title: Settings
settings.identityDesc: What other members see on your collector profile.
settings.identityBioPlaceholder: A few words about your collection, drift/JDM passions…
settings.identitySlugHint: Lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens only.
settings.identityCityHint: Shown on your listings to help buyers estimate shipping costs.
settings.identitySlugTaken: This URL is already taken — pick another.
settings.securityDesc: Email and password are managed by our authentication service.
settings.securityEmailHint: To change your email, contact support or sign in again via Auth0.
settings.addressesDesc: Used for shipping on trades or sales.

trophies.title: Trophies
trophies.noUser: Log in to see your trophies.

drop.title: Next drop
drop.desc: A limited edition is coming. Stay tuned to be notified first.

season2.title: Season 2
season2.teaser: A new Pocket Drifterz season is in the works…

onboarding.welcomeDesc: Collect Pocket Drifterz cards, complete Season 1 and trade with the drift/JDM community.
onboarding.sceneDesc: Pick your playgrounds — we'll personalize your feed and drops.
onboarding.goalDesc: We'll tune your shortcuts. You can do everything anyway.

sell.title: Buy & sell
sell.sub: Bring my collection to the marketplace.

onboarding.boosterDesc: 3 free cards to start your collection. Tap to open.
onboarding.pulledDesc: They join your Season 1 binder. Welcome to the race.
onboarding.title: Getting started
onboarding.intro: Four steps to get started on The Park.
onboarding.step1Desc: Add cards and track each version separately.
onboarding.step2Desc: See what the community lists and wants.
onboarding.step3Desc: Double validation, contextual chat, optional secured shipping.
onboarding.skipHint: You can revisit this guide from Help.

exchangePropose.title: Propose a trade
exchangePropose.subtitle: Select cards you offer — only ones you own.
exchangePropose.noUser: Log in to propose a trade.
exchangePropose.errorReserved: This card is already reserved by an active listing. Remove it from the marketplace to trade it.
exchangePropose.errorNotOwned: You do not own one of the selected cards.
exchangePropose.messageDefault: Hey! Want to swap these cards?
exchangePropose.messageDefaultForCard: Hi! I'm interested in {card} — want to trade?
exchangePropose.securedHint: Stripe deposit (100% of received value), guided video proofs and 72 h guarantee window. Fees are on you.

security.title: Secured shipping
security.noUser: Log in to access secured flow.
security.demoOnly: Demo UI — no real Stripe or video upload

shippingOption.heroKicker: Buying from a member · choose your protection
shippingOption.heroDesc: Secured shipping adds guided video proof, verified tracking and financial guarantee (deposit held on both sides, released on delivery). Fees are on you — you choose to secure this parcel.
shippingOption.securedDesc: Payment stays held by Stripe until conform delivery. The card is filmed at every step.
shippingOption.standardDesc: Direct payment to seller, simple shipping. No proof, no guarantee if something goes wrong — you accept the risk.
shippingOption.standardWarning: Not covered by The Park protection
shippingOption.flow1Desc: Stripe freezes your payment — nothing goes to the seller yet.
shippingOption.flow2Desc: Seller films the card, packaging and drop-off.
shippingOption.flow4Desc: OK receipt → payment released to seller.
shippingOption.cautionDesc: Stripe pre-authorization, not charged. Captured to seller only on conform delivery, otherwise cancelled.
shippingOption.footerHint: Without secured shipping, no guarantee applies. Deposit requires identity verification (KYC) via Stripe.

actions.proofHint: Accepted formats: MP4, WebM, MOV. Max 200 MB. Video is stored and timestamped server-side.

garantie.title: Guarantee extension
garantie.desc: 72 h window after delivery to report issues.

option-envoi.title: Choose secured shipping
option-envoi.desc: On a trade, each party chooses security for what they receive.

envoi.title: Shipping video proofs
envoi.desc: In-app guided filming with daily anti-replay token.

echange.title: Secured trade flow
echange.desc: Strict state machine: accept → ship D+3 → receive → close.

litige.title: Dispute & arbitration
litige.desc: Guided opening, minor priority, 48 h moderation SLA.

want.title: I am looking for a card
want.subtitle: Tell the community which card you are after — we will connect you with sellers.
want.disclaimer: Wants connect members directly. Purchases use the credit wallet when a listing matches.

saleCheckout.sellerNotified: The seller has been notified and must prepare shipment.

reviews.title: Leave a review
reviews.alreadyReviewed: You've already left a review for this transaction.
reviews.errorGeneric: Something went wrong, please try again.
reviews.pendingHint: These transactions are done — leave a review for your trading partners.

friends.friendsEmpty: You have no rivals on The Park yet
